product: Lakebase will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance…
tagline: On or after April 30, 2026, Lakebase will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile when the compliance standard is set to HIPAA, C5, TISAX, or None.
what_it_does: On or after April 30, 2026, Lakebase will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile when the compliance standard is set to HIPAA, C5, TISAX, or None. Lakebase Postgres provides data protection features to help secure your databases and control access to critical data. These features enable you to protect production environments and establish secure network connectivity between your applications and databases.
why_it_matters: Postgres clients connecting from outside the workspace also require inbound Private Link for performance intensive services.

key_takeaway: On or after April 30, 2026, Lakebase will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile when the compliance standard is set to HIPAA, C5, TISAX, or None.
